query: SELECT l.id, l.title, l.lessonOrder, c.code, c.title as courseTitle FROM lessons l JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id WHERE c.code LIKE 'GED%' ORDER BY c.code, l.lessonOrder
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, l.lessonOrder, c.code, c.title as courseTitle FROM lessons l JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id WHERE c.code LIKE 'GED%' ORDER BY c.code, l.lessonOrder
